rationale: This candidate provides the most natural and technically accurate translation while perfectly preserving the MDX structure. It captures Dan's direct, conversational tone ('Et que Dieu vous vienne en aide', 'Mettez-les en JSONB et passez à autre chose') much better than the 'current' version, which is somewhat dry and incomplete (missing title/subtitle). It also correctly translates technical concepts like 'sharding' (partitionnement) and 'snapshot' (instantané) in a way that makes sense to a French developer.
